name: Cornbread-Apple-Sage Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 7 tablespoons dried sage or fresh equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half of the butter and sauté the onions and apples.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large mixing bowl.
3. Melt the other half of the butter and add it to the bowl with the remaining ingredients.
Any stuffing that is not used to stuff a fowl can be baked in a covered casserole for 30-45 minutes at 325°F. Often, this gets eaten up long before any leftover bird.
